title: BuildkitCobblemon
description: Feature rich and Cohesive Cobblemon Experience focusing on Exploration and Fair Multiplayer
body:
Buildkit Cobblemon aims to have a seamless expierience blending minecraft and pokemon. Everything in the pack is tailored around a traveling pokemon expierience. Set foot through the beautiful biomes of terralith, trek through the hellish BetterNether, and discover wonders in the BetterEnd, all with your trusty pokemon at your side!


This pack is an alpha expierience; I have put a lot of time into it but changes will come as I play the pack with friends. Please leave any feedback on my [discord](https://discord.gg/87Nc8BhHMb)!
